name: test
promptTemplate:
## Tech Stack
- **Framework:** React (TypeScript)
- **Build:** Vite
- **State:** React Context API
- **Storage:** localStorage
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui components
- **Component Library:** shadcn/ui (Radix UI primitives)
- **Markdown:** react-markdown

## Design System: shadcn/ui

### Core Components to Install
```bash
npx shadcn-ui@latest init
npx shadcn-ui@latest add button card input textarea badge dialog select separator scroll-area toast
```

### Component Usage Plan
- **Button:** Primary actions (Save, Copy, New Skill)
- **Card:** Skill grid items
- **Dialog:** New skill form, delete confirmations
- **Input/Textarea:** Form fields
- **Badge:** Category pills, tag pills
- **Select:** Category dropdown
- **Toast:** Action confirmations (Copied!, Saved!, Deleted!)
- **Scroll-area:** Detail panel content
- **Separator:** Visual dividers in detail panel

### Customization Strategy
- Use shadcn's default theme as base (neutral palette)
- Customize accent color to blue-600 for primary actions
- Category badges: Override badge variant colors per category
- Keep card shadows subtle (shadcn default is good)
- Mobile: Use shadcn's responsive drawer component for detail panel

### Typography (Tailwind + shadcn defaults)
- Headings: `text-xl font-semibold` (skill names)
- Body: `text-sm text-muted-foreground` (descriptions)
- Metadata: `text-xs text-muted-foreground` (dates, counts)
- Use shadcn's typography conventions (they're already optimized)

---

## Instructions for Claude Code

### Setup Phase
1. Create Vite + React + TypeScript project
2. Install Tailwind CSS
3. Run `npx shadcn-ui@latest init` (choose defaults)
4. Add components listed above
5. Verify shadcn theme in `tailwind.config.js`

### Component Architecture
- **All UI components from shadcn/ui** — no custom buttons, cards, modals
- shadcn components live in `/src/components/ui` (auto-generated)
- Feature components in `/src/components` (SkillCard, SkillGrid, DetailPanel, etc.)
- Compose shadcn primitives into feature components
- Example: SkillCard uses shadcn's Card + Badge + Button

### Styling Rules
- **Only use Tailwind classes** — no custom CSS files
- Use shadcn's semantic color tokens:
  - `bg-background`, `text-foreground`
  - `bg-card`, `border-border`
  - `text-muted-foreground` for secondary text
- Category colors: Override badge `variant` prop with custom Tailwind classes
- Spacing: Use Tailwind's default scale (p-4, gap-6, etc.)

### Design Preferences
- **Trust shadcn defaults:** Their spacing, shadows, radii are production-tested
- **Don't over-customize:** If shadcn has a pattern for it, use it as-is
- **Accessibility:** shadcn handles focus states, ARIA — don't override unless necessary
- **Mobile:** Use shadcn's Drawer component (not Dialog) for detail panel on small screens

---

## Category Color Palette (Custom badges)

```typescript
const categoryColors = {
  Design: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border-amber-200',
  Dev: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 border-emerald-200',
  Research: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800 border-purple-200',
  Writing: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border-blue-200',
  Other: 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 border-slate-200',
};
```

Apply these as className overrides to shadcn's Badge component.

name: Reserarch
